sodium-profiles.preset.ultra.tooltip:
Maximum FPS — lowest visuals.

§a▶ Render Distance: 4
§a▶ Entity Distance: 50%
§a▶ FPS Limit: 260
§a▶ VSync: OFF
§a▶ Clouds: OFF
§a▶ Particles: Minimal
§a▶ Ambient Occlusion: OFF
§a▶ Mipmap: OFF
§a▶ Biome Blend: OFF

§cBest for low-end PCs or maximum FPS.
sodium-profiles.preset.performance.toolt:
Good FPS with reasonable visuals.

§e▶ Render Distance: 8
§e▶ Entity Distance: 75%
§e▶ FPS Limit: 260
§e▶ VSync: OFF
§e▶ Clouds: Fast
§e▶ Particles: Decreased
§e▶ Mipmap: 2
§e▶ Biome Blend: 2

§aBest balance of FPS and visuals.
sodium-profiles.preset.balanced.tooltip:
Balance between quality and performance.

§b▶ Render Distance: 12
§b▶ Entity Distance: 100%
§b▶ FPS Limit: 120
§b▶ VSync: ON
§b▶ Clouds: Fancy
§b▶ Particles: All
§b▶ Mipmap: 4
§b▶ Biome Blend: 5

§aGood default for most PCs.
sodium-profiles.preset.quality.tooltip:
Maximum visual quality.

§d▶ Render Distance: 16
§d▶ Entity Distance: 150%
§d▶ FPS Limit: 260
§d▶ VSync: ON
§d▶ Clouds: Fancy
§d▶ Particles: All
§d▶ Mipmap: 4
§d▶ Biome Blend: 7
§d▶ Chunk Fade: 1.0s

§cBest for screenshots and high-end PCs.
sodium-profiles.custom.apply.tooltip: Click to apply the '%s' profile settings.
sodium-profiles.button.create_profile.to: Save your current settings as a custom profile. Maximum 5 profiles.
sodium-profiles.field.name: Profile Name
